name: Be My Angel
original_name: ฉันหลงรักเทวดาของฉัน
overview: Jane, a first-jobber with horrible luck, exchanges her life's worth of merit points for three wishes in the Lucky Points app. However, not only does she not get her wishes fulfilled, she's instead sent Z, a bottom of the barrel angel with absolutely zero skills.
